opening_utterance: Mi hermano insiste que dejo mi trabajo para ayudarle por su nuevo negocio, pero no estoy seguro.
notes: B2 weighing a difficult decision. Multi-error: misses subjunctive after volition/emotion verbs AND swaps por/para in purpose/cause contexts. Tests whether the agent picks the higher-priority error (subjunctive) to recast and lets the secondary error pass naturally.
